resolvedFindings.finding: A failing git status was swallowed and could be interpreted as a clean vendor tree.
resolvedFindings.resolution: Status exit is preserved and fails closed; a corrupt-index regression reproduces and closes the old behavior.

resolvedFindings.finding: The developer evidence bundle algorithm was ambiguous and its claimed hash was not reproducible.
resolvedFindings.resolution: The handoff now specifies exact workdir, files, basenames, order, locale, exclusions, and command; the reviewer reproduced the bundle.

resolvedFindings.finding: The ETS vendor path still reused a checkout by matching HEAD alone, so a dirty test authority could enter an external build.
resolvedFindings.resolution: Before any external run, ETS reuse and refresh were moved onto the shared fail-closed clean-source and validated narrow replacement path.

resolvedFindings.finding: Run 2026-07-18T17-06-05Z created its fresh stack and began TestNG before task 5.4 reviewer approval was signed.
resolvedFindings.resolution: The run was denied final authority and replaced by post-approval fresh-volume run 2026-07-18T17-09-45Z.

procedurallySupersededExternalRun.reason: fresh stack and TestNG began before task 5.4 reviewer approval was signed

intendedHarnessChanges: fail-closed clean vendor reuse and narrow validated replacement
